violations.description: CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food that does not require the same cooking temperature. Container of raw whole muscle meat cut noted on top of container of pre-cooked soup. Critical violation corrected through training on the topic.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior and reach-in cooler door gaskets noted not properly maintained/cleaned.
PREMISES (1 pts): Coat in kitchen noted not properly located. Employee coat/hooded sweat shirt noted hanging on rack with clean dishes and utensils.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler door gasket noted not in good repair and in need of cleaning. However it likely cannot be extended and cleaned properly without further damaging the gasket.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. Lid is either missing or open. Also dumpster must be located inside the fenced containment area.
